scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ..
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.build:all: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.test: echo "Run tests from backend or frontend folders"
scripts.setup:env: cd backend && cp .env.example .env && cd ../frontend && cp .env.example .env && echo "✅ .env files created. Add your API keys!"
